changes.text: Daily missions — complete daily challenges and build streaks for bonus rewards
Back buttons added to web-redirect screens for easier navigation
General UI polish and consistency improvements
Missions correctly show only tasks you can actually complete right now
Deposit balance updates are now handled more reliably
Bike Store — buy bikes directly with BTC from the home screen and store page
Wallet recovery prompts appear automatically when keys are missing before a purchase
Bike purchases are now signed on-device for improved security
Purchased bikes are available immediately as in-game items (export to NFT later)
iOS app crash fix
Real-time balance, energy, and swap status updates — no more manual refreshing
Bike detail floating action bar — all actions (Equip, Level Up, Sell, Export, Breed) always visible at a glance
Bike images load significantly faster with optimized mobile formats and loading indicators
Buttons and cards redesigned for a cleaner, more consistent look across the app
HP restore parts rebalanced so higher-level parts always outperform multiple lower-level ones
Swap Phase 2 completion no longer fails for users with limited UTXOs
Swap sign button no longer appears before the transaction is ready
Pause and resume rides — take a break without ending your activity
Social rewards — link your X account and earn SAP for following, liking, and retweeting
SAT token now displays its icon on-chain
Swap flow redesigned with clearer step-by-step progress and signing prompts
Background swap monitoring automatically tracks pending transactions
GPS drift no longer incorrectly earns rewards while stationary
SAT/BTC swap transactions now complete correctly
Ride timer correctly excludes paused time

versions.title: Marketplace Filters, UI Refresh & Wallet Fixes

changes.text: Marketplace filter drawer with level and mint count range sliders
Profile page redesigned with Account, Stats, and Referrals tabs
Wallet screen redesigned with visual action cards
Marketplace now displays bikes, parts, and tools in separate grids
Improved UI consistency and styling across the app
SAT/BTC swaps now recover properly after server restarts
Swap status updates no longer show false errors
Wallet key sync works correctly across address formats
Mobile keyboard invisible characters no longer break wallet recovery import
GPS route map on ride detail screen — see your ride path on an interactive map
Wallet Settings screen with recovery phrase backup, import, and reset options
Wallet recovery prompt on swap, deposit, and profile screens when keys are missing
Marketplace sell modal now shows bike and part cards instead of plain text
SAT token renamed from "SAT Move-to-Earn" to "Satoshis Activity Token"
Improved error messages across all screens — raw technical errors are no longer shown to users
Android app crash when viewing ride history on the map
Android push notifications now display correctly for toolbox drops
Wallet recovery import now verifies your address to prevent accidental overwrites
Bike type names standardized across the app
HP Lifeline safety net — if your bike's HP drops critically low after a ride, it gets a one-time automatic repair
New "Trigger HP Lifeline" task with SAP reward
Smarter anti-cheat detection for stationary phones
Toolbox drops now require actual movement during your ride
Breeding balance updated — cross-tier breeding now favors the lower-quality parent
Energy calculation no longer counts bikes listed on the marketplace or exported
Activity tracking is more resilient to app crashes and network issues
Android back button no longer exits the live activity screen
Ride timer now syncs with the server for accurate elapsed time
Home screen detects active rides faster for quicker resume
Currency labels corrected to "SAP" throughout the marketplace
Wallet keys now sync properly after Google sign-in
Marketplace purchases no longer fail when seller has no balance entry
Improved error messages when activities fail to start or stop
Activity history screen to view past rides
Crash recovery for interrupted activities — ride data is saved locally and can be resumed
Faster wallet operations with prepared transaction caching
GPS tracking now saves data locally first for better reliability
Android live tracking improved with native foreground service
Toolbox rewards now based on actual riding time instead of total session time
Login now works correctly across different address formats
Marketplace listing modal scroll behavior fixed
Improved bike image display
Improved text readability and accessibility across the app
Additional testing rewards for early testers
Choose your own bike when getting started
Revamped bike economic model for better balance
Improved GPS logging accuracy
Internal stability improvements
Part bonuses now visible on Bike Detail and Level Up screens
Your own listings are marked in the Marketplace
App prompts you to update when a new version is available
"SAT Points" renamed to "SAP" (Satoshi Activity Points) everywhere
Socket unequip no longer crashes the app on iOS
Energy cap now applied correctly during earning
Max energy updates properly when staking or unstaking
Google Sign-In on preview/production builds (missing EAS environment variables)
Wallet import functionality
Task system with API endpoints
Referral system introduction
Whitepaper link in Profile
Native Google Sign-In replaces browser-based flow
Emission interval changed to 30 seconds (from 1 minute)
New auth structure
Unload from sockets crash
Removed GPS penalty for short walks
SAT staking with milestone tiers (Iron to Legend)
SAT/BTC swap via NativeSwap integration
Bike and part breeding system
Equipment upgrade system
Earning bonuses from streak, holding ratio & staking
Changelog page on customer dashboard
Dark mode support across all app screens
Loyalty streak tracking with tier badges
Energy recovery timer accuracy
Marketplace for buying and selling bikes & parts
SAP to SAT Token conversion
Mystery box drops from activities
Toolbox opening with random rewards
Leaderboard rankings
Renamed entities: Sneakers to Bikes, Gems to Parts
Google account linking for cross-device sign-in
Wallet balance display rounding
Bike-to-earn activity tracking with GPS
Bike inventory with quality tiers
Part socketing for earning boosts
Energy system with daily recovery
SAP earning from rides
Wallet generation and OPNet integration
Bike leveling system
Profile with lifetime stats
